name: sec-opendata
description: Pull Thai SEC Open Data from api.sec.or.th across v1/v2 bond, fund, PVD, digital asset, Licence Check, One Report, and related endpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch Thai SEC Open Data across all portal categories.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill and Python CLI for SEC Open Data Thailand. It supports the sec-open-api skill with bundled endpoint references for v2 bond/fund APIs and v1 PVD, digital asset, Licence Check, and One Report APIs, plus generic raw request support.
defaultPrompt: Fetch a One Report financial statement.
List SEC portal API key scopes.
